patch:
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Utils/ScalarEvolutionExpander.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Utils/ScalarEvolutionExpander.cpp
index c7d758aa575e..7acdfcb5d1e4 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Utils/ScalarEvolutionExpander.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Utils/ScalarEvolutionExpander.cpp
@@ -825,6 +825,8 @@ bool SCEVExpander::canReuseFlagsFromOriginalIVInc(PHINode *OrigPhi,
                                                   PHINode *WidePhi,
                                                   Instruction *OrigInc,
                                                   Instruction *WideInc) {
+  if (!OrigInc || !WideInc || !isa<BinaryOperator>(OrigInc) || !isa<BinaryOperator>(WideInc))
+    return false;
   return match(OrigInc, m_c_BinOp(m_Specific(OrigPhi), m_Value())) &&
          match(WideInc, m_c_BinOp(m_Specific(WidePhi), m_Value())) &&
          OrigInc->getOpcode() == WideInc->getOpcode();
test_traj:
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Utils/ScalarEvolutionExpander.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Utils/ScalarEvolutionExpander.cpp
index c7d758aa575e..7ad0bdf28dc3 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Utils/ScalarEvolutionExpander.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Utils/ScalarEvolutionExpander.cpp
@@ -825,7 +825,9 @@ bool SCEVExpander::canReuseFlagsFromOriginalIVInc(PHINode *OrigPhi,
                                                   PHINode *WidePhi,
                                                   Instruction *OrigInc,
                                                   Instruction *WideInc) {
-  return match(OrigInc, m_c_BinOp(m_Specific(OrigPhi), m_Value())) &&
+  if (!isa<BinaryOperator>(OrigInc) || !isa<BinaryOperator>(WideInc))
+    return false;
+  return match(OrigInc, m_c_BinOp(m_Specific(OrigPhi), m_Value()))   return match(OrigInc, m_c_BinOp(m_Specific(OrigPhi), m_Value())) &&  return match(OrigInc, m_c_BinOp(m_Specific(OrigPhi), m_Value())) &&
          match(WideInc, m_c_BinOp(m_Specific(WidePhi), m_Value())) &&
          OrigInc->getOpcode() == WideInc->getOpcode();
 }

+  if (!isa<BinaryOperator>(OrigInc) || !isa<BinaryOperator>(WideInc))

   return match(OrigInc, m_c_BinOp(m_Specific(OrigPhi), m_Value())) &&
          match(WideInc, m_c_BinOp(m_Specific(WidePhi), m_Value())) &&
          OrigInc->getOpcode() == WideInc->getOpcode();
